learning_roadmap.title: Build the Foundation: {first_gap}
learning_roadmap.description: Learn the essentials of {first_gap} through a structured tutorial and practical exercises.

learning_roadmap.title: Apply in Context: {second_gap}
learning_roadmap.description: Utilize {second_gap} to build a small feature or handle a real-world scenario.

learning_roadmap.title: Package and Present
learning_roadmap.description: Create a showcase repository or report highlighting what you built and how AI tools assisted you.

ai_exposure_breakdown.ai_role: AI draft generation, summaries, and formula generation.
ai_exposure_breakdown.human_role: Human fact-checks, validates inputs, and ensures relevance.

ai_exposure_breakdown.ai_role: AI can summarize options and compare tradeoffs.
ai_exposure_breakdown.human_role: Human owns the final decision, responsibility, and context alignment.

ai_exposure_breakdown.ai_role: AI assists in troubleshooting or code generation.
ai_exposure_breakdown.human_role: Human guides the debugging, validates logic, and manages edge cases.

evolution_timeline.title: Foundation Phase
evolution_timeline.description: Gain core domain literacy and ship your first mini-project in this field.

evolution_timeline.title: Application Phase
evolution_timeline.description: Gain hands-on experience through small freelance tasks, internships, or open-source projects.

evolution_timeline.title: Specialized Professional
evolution_timeline.description: Integrate domain expertise with AI-augmented workflows to establish a unique niche.

future_self.headline: Emerging {title} Practitioner
future_self.narrative: {name} can kickstart their journey in {cluster} by building projects that highlight core capabilities. Continuous learning and AI integration will pave the way.
future_resume_highlights: Completed a hands-on starter project related to {title}.
Demonstrated responsible AI leverage while retaining human agency.
Documented learning iterations and technical deliverables.

risk_heatmap.description: Routine tasks can be accelerated or fully completed with AI tools.
Rapid changes in tools require continuous learning and adaptability.
Standard entry-level tasks have high competition; niche specialization is key.
Reputational credibility and domain intuition are critical human advantages.
